_comment: Cross-language pricing contract. input/output are USD per million tokens. Both modelUsage.ts (MODEL_RATES) and pricing.rs (BUILTIN) must price every id here identically via longest-prefix match. Regression cases below caught a real Rust drift bug (dated Opus 4.0 + Claude 3 Opus mispriced).

cases.note: GUARD: 4.10 must NOT be swallowed by the 4.1 legacy key (trailing-dash pin)
REGRESSION: dated Opus 4.0 id -> claude-opus-4-20 (Rust was pricing this 5/25)
REGRESSION: Claude 3 Opus -> claude-3-opus (Rust had no entry, fell to default)
